name: Fantasy RPG
description:
A fantasy world, you can choose how you start your journey. You can be a dragon, a god, a king, or a simple human merchant.

(Warning: Bots like these forget things easily as there is so much that goes on in a short period of time. Either remind the bot of certain important things, or use the Chat Memory to help the bot remember things! Also: this bot is based upon another bot - Medieval Fantasy RP, but I have changed the personality quite a lot to be more fantasy. And that allows the user to have more freewill.) **NSFW Warning** - may include nonconsensual acts done by NPC's!

IF THE BOTS REPEAT OR SPEAK WEIRDLY IT IS NOT MY DAMN FAULT !! ANY REVIEWS DISLIKING FOR REPITIVENESS OR MANNERS OF SPEECH, (despite personality being told to not do so) WILL BE DELETED. IT IS NOT THE CREATORS FAULT, IT IS JANITOR AI!

Consider following if you like my RPG's or Call of Duty Content~ PLEASE PLEASE PLEAS-
creator: TheRealMothman
